dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your health overview — upload documents and track your medical history.
dashboard.no_records_hint: Upload a prescription or lab report above to get started.

upload.title: Upload a Document
upload.subtitle: PDF, JPEG, or PNG · Max 20 MB. We'll extract and structure the contents automatically.
upload.drop_label: Drop a file here or click to browse

alerts.title: Drug Alerts
alerts.subtitle: Detected interactions across your full medication history.
alerts.no_active_hint: Upload more documents or click "Re-run check" to scan your current medication list.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.subtitle: Your complete health history in reverse chronological order.
timeline.no_records_hint: Upload your first document from the Dashboard.
timeline.processing_failed: Processing failed — open to view details.

share.title: Share Records
share.subtitle: Create a time-limited read-only link for a clinician.
share.history_desc: A log of all share activity and record views. Last 20 events.
share.active_links_desc: These links are currently valid. Clinicians with the link can view the shared records.
share.no_active_links_hint: Use the button above to create one.
share.revoke_confirm: Revoke this share link? The clinician will immediately lose access.
share.expires_in_days: {days, plural, one {Expires in 1 day} other {Expires in # days}}

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile and account preferences.
settings.language_hint: Medical summaries will be generated in your chosen language for new uploads.
settings.readonly_hint: Contact support to update your account details.
settings.delete_hint: Permanently delete your account and all health records. This action cannot be undone.
settings.profile_error: Could not load profile. Please try signing out and back in.
settings.language_footer: Language changes apply immediately and affect medical summaries for all new uploads.
settings.delete_confirm_desc: This will permanently delete your account, all uploaded records, medications, lab values, drug conflicts, and share links. This action cannot be undone.

record.uploaded_at: Uploaded {date} · Signed URL expires in 1 hour
record.preview_expired: The signed URL may have expired. Reload the page.
record.no_summary: No summary available for this record.
record.meds_hint: Extracted from document. Low-confidence entries were identified by NER only and may need verification.
record.no_medications: No medications extracted from this record.
record.labs_hint: Abnormal values are highlighted. Ranges are from the source document where available.
record.no_labs: No lab values extracted from this record.
record.verify_disclaimer: Always verify extracted data against the original document.

record_card.lab_results: {count, plural, one {# lab result} other {# lab results}}
record_card.needs_review: Needs review — no medications or lab values were extracted. Open the record to verify.

welcome.title: Welcome to MediSync
welcome.subtitle: Your invisible health ledger — private, structured, and always in your hands.
welcome.description: MediSync lets you upload medical documents from any source — prescriptions, lab reports, discharge summaries — and builds a structured chronological record. Drug interactions are flagged automatically, and you can share scoped, time-limited views with clinicians without giving up control of your data.
welcome.feature_1: Upload and store all your medical documents in one place
welcome.feature_2: View your full health history on a chronological timeline
welcome.feature_3: Get automatic drug conflict alerts across your medication history
welcome.feature_4: Share time-limited, read-only links with clinicians — revocable any time
welcome.limit_1: AI extraction may miss details from handwritten documents — always verify extracted data against the original.
welcome.limit_2: Drug conflict detection uses a curated dataset; always consult your doctor before changing medications.
welcome.limit_3: Shared links expire automatically and can be revoked at any time.
welcome.get_started: Get started — Upload your first record
